channel.title: Security on INFINI Console
channel.description: Recent content in Security on INFINI Console

item.title: Role
item.description: Role Management # Role Management includes CURD operations for role. And INFINI Console has a builtin role named Administrator, it has all privileges , includes Platform and Data. The data role can help us control privileges of elasticsearch, includes elasticsearch api privileges which can be configured in the file config/permission.json of your setup path. Create Platform Role # Enter role name, role name should be unique. Select feature privileges, can not be empty.

item.title: User
item.description: User Management # User Management includes CURD operations and reset password for user. Create User # User name is required, and it should be unique. Nick name, phone, email, is optional. Select one or more role. Tags is optional, it helps you group users. Search User # Enter keywords and click the search button to query users. Update User # Modify as needed, and then click the Save button to submit.
